reviews.comment:
Baños sucios, considerando que pago más de $45.600 al año como socio. Inaceptable. Siempre tiene un problema, Hoy no había nafta (infinia 04/10/22) por lo que perdí el descuento UNA VEZ MÁS. NO RECOMIENDO SER SOCIO DE ACA, PLATA TIRADA, el seguro me da igual servicio, ya que la hotelería es cara

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms, considering I pay over $45,600 a year as a member. Unacceptable. There's always a problem. Today there was no gas (Infinia 04/10/22) so I lost my discount ONCE AGAIN. I DO NOT RECOMMEND BEING A MEMBER HERE, IT'S A WASTE OF MONEY. The insurance provides the same service, since the hotels are expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNS1xWENnEAE
